_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Bua mohumagadi, o tsene.
speakFriend.description: Liana Banyan e agile go bula go puo nngwe le nngwe. Puo nngwe le nngwe e na le moputso o mongwe wa phetolelo.
speakFriend.marksAwarded: Marks e neelwa (ditokene tsa go tshwara karolo)
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Lenaane la dipuo le ditekelo tsa Marks ke tsa selekanyo. Marks ke ditokene tsa karolo, eseng dikaelo.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Fetola Liana Banyan go {{language}}. Bona {{marks}} Marks.
speakFriend.scopeWelcome: Dikarata tsa Amogela / Lefatshe la Mewa
speakFriend.scopeNavigation: Ditlhomeso tsa tsela le melaetsa ya mathata
speakFriend.baseLanguage: Puo ya motheo -- ga go moputso o o hlokegang.
speakFriend.speakFounderTitle: Lentswe la Mothei: Ke Goreng Mafoko Ano
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Lentsu lefe lefe mono le bitsiwa ka lebaka. Motheo wa maina 26 a botlhokwa.
speakFriend.howBountiesWork: Meputso ya Phetolelo e Dira Jang
speakFriend.step1Body: Bula Moputso wa Phetolelo go tswa Help Wanted.
speakFriend.step2Body: Fetola distring tsotlhe tse di hlokegang. Romela ka Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Morago ga go amogela, o bona Marks e kwadisiwa mo IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Bua ga mogakolodi, o tsene."

languageSwitcher.tip: Dirisa diphasewete tsa dipuo tse di farologaneng kwa Kgoro ya Durin go bula maitemogelo a a ikgethileng!
